subject: Risk Reversals Ideas from Patricia
body:
From:  "Glass, Patricia S" <Patricia.Glass@morganstanley.com>
Date:  Monday, October 3, 2016 at 5:41 PM
To:  Richard Kahn <richardkahn12@gmail.com>
Subject:  Risk Reversals Update and .pdf    Robert Bodnar, Listed Options
October 3, 2016    11:20 am

I¹ll add that the levels were taken on Friday 9/30/16 and are prior to a per
share commission.  Let¹s hear first your take on the suggestions.   Thanks,
Patricia 
 

From: Glass, Patricia S (Wealth Mgmt MS)
Sent: Monday, October 03, 2016 5:39 PM
To: Richard Kahn
Subject: Risk Reversals Update and .pdf Robert Bodnar, Listed Options
October 3, 2016 11:20 am
 
Hello Richard ­ Robert Bodnar, who was on our call Friday, pulled together
this presentation with his picks, 2 financials (JPM, GS) and 1 oil service
co (SLB).  In addition to looking favorable from a skew perspective, all 3
names our Outperform rated at MS.  Please see the attached.  Let me know
if/when you might like a follow up call to discuss.
 
Thanks, 
Patricia 
 
 
Patricia S. Glass, CDFA®
Senior Vice President I Portfolio Management Director
Morgan Stanley Wealth Management
1290 Avenue of the Americas, 12th Floor
New York, NY  10104
Phone: 212-883-7790
Fax:       212-705-4592
patricia.glass@ms.com
www.morganstanleyfa.com/patricia.glass/
<http://www.morganstanleyfa.com/patricia.glass/>
NMLS # 1265124
 
Connect with me:  
<https://www.linkedin.com/in/patricia-glass-92b598b?trk=nav_responsive_tab_p
rofile> 
 
The use of the CDFA® (Certified Divorce Financial Analyst®)designation does
not permit the rendering of legal advice by Morgan Stanley or its Financial

is not intended to imply that either Morgan Stanley or its Financial

From: Bodnar, Robert D (Capital Markets)
Sent: Monday, October 03, 2016 11:21 AM
To: Glass, Patricia S (Wealth Mgmt MS)
Cc: Bodnar, Robert D (Capital Markets)
Subject: Risk Reversals Update and .pdf Robert Bodnar, Listed Options
October 3, 2016 11:20 am
 
Good morning, 
 
Please review, and ring for any further information:
 
Robert Bodnar,
Executive Director
Morgan Stanley Wealth Listed- Options Product Manager

New York
(212) 762 9903

I’ll add that the levels were taken on Friday 9/30/16 and are prior to a per share commission.  Let’s hear first your take on the suggestions.   Thanks, Patricia

Patricia
